result: The task has been completed successfully. The R script has been executed and produced the output file `data/output/cleaned_data.csv` containing 16,111 records with two variables: NSID and alcfst. The alcfst variable is a factor with levels for each observed age (14, 15, 16, 17, 19, 20, 25, 32), plus 99 = "Never had alcohol" and -8 = "Don't know/insufficient information". The distribution shows 6,155 individuals first drank at age 14, 2,707 at age 15, 1,227 at age 16, 1,060 at age 17, 654 at age 19, and the remaining distributed across ages 20, 25, 32, with 3,121 classified as "Don't know/insufficient information" and 1,187 classified as "Never had alcohol".
